import axios from'axios';const API_BASE=process.env.REACT_APP_API_URL||'http://localhost:8000';const api=axios.create({baseURL:"".concat(API_BASE,"/api"),headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json'}});// Event Types
export const getEventTypes=()=>api.get('/events/');export const getAllEventTypes=()=>api.get('/events/all');export const getEventTypeBySlug=slug=>api.get("/events/".concat(slug));export const createEventType=data=>api.post('/events/',data);export const updateEventType=(id,data)=>api.put("/events/".concat(id),data);export const deleteEventType=id=>api.delete("/events/".concat(id));export const bulkAssignSchedule=data=>api.put('/events/bulk-assign-schedule',data);// Availability
export const getAvailability=()=>api.get('/availability/');export const getAllSchedules=()=>api.get('/availability/all');export const createSchedule=data=>api.post('/availability/',data);export const updateAvailability=(id,data)=>api.put("/availability/".concat(id),data);export const deleteSchedule=id=>api.delete("/availability/".concat(id));export const addDateOverride=data=>api.post('/availability/overrides',data);export const deleteDateOverride=id=>api.delete("/availability/overrides/".concat(id));// Bookings
export const getAvailableSlots=(eventSlug,date,timezone)=>api.get('/bookings/slots',{params:{event_slug:eventSlug,date,timezone}});export const createBooking=data=>api.post('/bookings/',data);// Meetings
export const getMeetings=params=>api.get('/meetings/',{params});export const getMeeting=id=>api.get("/meetings/".concat(id));export const getMeetingByToken=token=>api.get("/meetings/token/".concat(token));export const cancelMeeting=(id,reason)=>api.put("/meetings/".concat(id,"/cancel"),{reason});export default api;
